Lyrics.text:
Omany ny fanilo
Andao hiakatra!
Moa renao ve ry mpino?
‘Ndry ny Mpampakatra!
Avy ‘Lay nantenaina
Mihirà hosana!
He tonga ny maraina
:,: Derao, Haleloia! :,:

Indreny ny anjely
Be voninahitra
Hamory ‘zay niely,
Handova lanitra,
Avy ‘Lay nantenaina
Mihirà hosana!
He tonga ny maraina
:,: Derao, Haleloia! :,

Tazano! Irỳ ny Tompo,
Mpandresy lehibe!
Nietry mba hanompo
Fa izao nasandratra e!
Avy ‘Lay nantenaina
Mihirà hosana!
He tonga ny maraina
:,: Derao, Haleloia! :,

Faingàna Jeso tia,
Miandry Anao ‘zahay,
Miantso hoe: « avia »,
Amen ! handray anay.
Avy ‘Lay nantenaina
Mihirà hosana!
He tonga ny maraina
:,: Derao, Haleloia! :,:
